ab: sua tangria maku Pani, Kanakanavu tamna manu kangvang sua nguain.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Pani，他也是卡那卡那富族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Pani, and he is also an Kanakanavu child.

ch: 我們一起在那瑪夏部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Namasia tribe.

ab: paira kim arakukunu tumatimana mamarang po’ʉ’ʉna.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說卡那卡那富語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Kanakanavu proficiently.

ab: marʉngʉcai ku mataa ciuman kangvang. manʉkʉpai mataa ta’uici sua Pani.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Pani很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Pani is short and thin.

ab: ma’intasʉ sua Pani, manmaan kavangvnag cau na ’inia.
ch: Pani很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Pani is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
